mapper.select: SELECT SUBSTR(date_time, 1, 10) as "date", SUM(CASE WHEN type LIKE '%入库%' OR type='IN' THEN quantity ELSE 0 END) as "inCount", SUM(CASE WHEN type LIKE '%出库%' OR type='OUT' THEN quantity ELSE 0 END) as "outCount" FROM bus_consumable_record WHERE date_time >= #{startTime} GROUP BY SUBSTR(date_time, 1, 10) ORDER BY "date" ASC
